---
title: "Conclusion"
author: "Yifan Cui"
format: html
---

# Conclusion

This project analyzed job market trends using data analysis and machine learning techniques. The results highlight the growing importance of technical skills such as Python, SQL, and Machine Learning.

Additionally, data visualization and communication skills are critical for translating data insights into business value.

Overall, this project demonstrates how data-driven approaches can help job seekers better understand market demands and make informed career decisions.

# Future Work

Future improvements could include:

- Using real-world datasets
- Applying more advanced machine learning models
- Expanding analysis to different industries
